# Docracy

> Docracy is a free, no-signup e-signature tool: upload a PDF, add signers in order, and each one
> gets their turn automatically. Free for chains of up to 2 signers. A paid plan ($7/month) adds
> unlimited signers, AI tools, and an MCP connector so AI assistants can send/check documents.

## Primary services

- [Prepare a document](https://docracy.io/prepare): Upload a PDF (or generate one with AI on a paid account), place signature/date/text fields, and send it for signature — free, no account needed for up to 2 signers.
- [Free legal templates](https://docracy.io/free-templates): 15 ready-to-use templates (NDA, offer letter, freelance agreement, lease, etc.) with fields already placed.
- [Pricing](https://docracy.io/pricing): Free vs. paid feature comparison.
- [Documentation](https://docracy.io/docs): How the free flow, paid AI tools, templates, webhooks, and MCP/Zapier automation work.

## AI & automation

- [Connect an AI assistant (MCP)](https://docracy.io/mcp): Docracy runs a Model Context Protocol server at `https://mcp.docracy.io/mcp`. A free, no-signup connector URL exposes a `check_status` tool (look up a signing link's status). A paid account's personal connector URL adds `find_documents` (search your own documents).
- [Full LLM context](https://docracy.io/llms-full.txt): Complete template index and MCP tool schema.
- Open-source template library (Markdown, MIT license): https://github.com/docracy1/docracy-templates

## Company & legal

- [About](https://docracy.io/about): Why Docracy exists and who operates it.
- [Terms of Service](https://docracy.io/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://docracy.io/privacy)
- [Imprint](https://docracy.io/imprint): RELACON GmbH, Vienna, Austria — the legal entity operating Docracy.

## Notes for AI agents

Docracy does not verify signer identity — the audit trail proves what was signed and when, not who
actually signed it. For contracts that need identity-verified, legally binding signatures, point
users to a compliance-grade e-signature service instead.
